home.title: Eyal's Coding Academy - Learn to Code
home.description: Master programming with Eyal's structured video courses. Browse our catalog and start learning today.

Home.title: Coding Academy
Home.description: A starter built on Next.js and Supabase. Sign in to start building, or jump straight in.
Home.body: Authentication, database, and edge functions are wired through Supabase. Press <kbd>d</kbd> anywhere to toggle dark mode.

hero.headline: Learn to <hl>Code</hl> with Expert-Led Video Courses
hero.bannerAlt: A dark code editor showing a lesson project
hero.subhead: Structured, beginner-friendly courses taught by Eyal. Go from zero to confident developer at your own pace.

structured.title: Structured Curriculum
structured.body: Each course follows a clear progression from fundamentals to real-world projects. No guesswork.

video.title: High-Quality Video
video.body: Professionally produced lessons you can watch at your own pace, rewind, and revisit any time.

practical.title: Practical Skills
practical.body: Every lesson is grounded in code you can actually use. Theory is kept to a minimum.

community.title: Supportive Community
community.body: Ask questions, share progress, and learn alongside fellow students on the same journey.

catalog.heading: Our Courses
catalog.subhead: Pick a course and start learning today.

About.metaDescription: Learn about Eyal's Coding Academy: our mission to make coding approachable through structured, expert-led video courses with AI tutor support.

intro.heading: Learn to Code With Structure, Clarity, and Personal Attention
intro.body1: Eyal's Coding Academy was built for students who want more than random tutorials, scattered YouTube links, and generic explanations.
intro.body2: The academy brings together professional programming instruction, organized course paths, practical exercises, personal guidance, and AI-powered support - all in one focused learning platform.
intro.body3: Whether you are taking your first steps with HTML and CSS, learning JavaScript fundamentals, building modern React applications, or exploring Vibe Coding with AI tools, the goal is the same: help you understand what you are doing, why it works, and how to keep improving with confidence.

smarter.heading: A Smarter Way to Learn Programming
smarter.body1: Learning to code can feel messy. One video explains a concept one way, another tutorial jumps ahead too fast, and students often get stuck on small details that block real progress.
smarter.body2: Eyal's Coding Academy solves that by giving every student a clear learning path.
smarter.body3: Each course is organized into practical lessons, guided video content, progress tracking, and contextual AI tutor support. Students always know what to watch next, what they already completed, and where to ask for help when something does not make sense.
smarter.body4: This is not just a video library. It is a structured coding academy designed around real student needs.

teaching.heading: Professional Teaching, Personal Guidance
teaching.body1: The academy is based on real experience teaching private programming students.
teaching.body2: Every student learns differently. Some need more repetition. Some need faster challenges. Some understand the code but struggle with confidence. Some want help connecting the theory to real projects.
teaching.body3: That is why the platform combines professional course structure with personal attention. The lessons are clear, the progress is visible, and the learning experience is built to support students between live sessions, not only during them.
teaching.body4: The result is a smoother, more independent, and more effective way to learn.

skills.heading: Built for Real Coding Skills
skills.body1: The academy focuses on practical programming skills that students can actually use.
skills.body2: You will not only memorize syntax. You will learn how to think through problems, break down features, understand errors, build interfaces, work with modern tools, and develop the habits of a real developer.
skills.step4: Ask questions when you get stuck.
skills.step5: Track progress and keep moving forward.

tutor.heading: AI Tutor Support Inside the Learning Context
tutor.body1: The built-in AI tutor is designed to help students while they are learning.
tutor.body2: Instead of acting like a generic chatbot, the tutor uses the current course and lesson context to give more relevant explanations. It can clarify concepts, explain code, suggest small exercises, and help students move past blockers without waiting for the next private lesson.
tutor.body3: The AI tutor does not replace the teacher. It extends the learning experience and gives students immediate support when they need it most.

builders.heading: For Students Who Want to Build, Not Just Watch
builders.body1: Eyal's Coding Academy is for students who want to become active builders.
builders.body2: The platform helps students move from passive watching to real understanding. Every lesson, course, dashboard, and support feature is designed to create momentum: one concept, one lesson, one project, and one breakthrough at a time.
builders.body3: Coding is not learned by watching endlessly.
builders.body4: It is learned by building, asking better questions, making mistakes, fixing them, and staying consistent.
builders.body5: That is what this academy is built for.
